originalAlarm.description: Dereference of null pointer (loaded from variable 'ptr')

reasoning: 472a474c663.c L14: null pointer dereference of ptr (// (6) ERROR). enable_IR_x2apic() sets ptr=NULL after first call (L15-16). When called a second time (via smp_sanity_check → APIC_init_uniprocessor when !smp_found_config), ptr is NULL and '*ptr = a' at L14 is a null deref. PC=CONFIG_SMP=T correctly constrains the code path that calls enable_IR_x2apic() twice. Known bug. Correctly constrained PC.
